info.title: Email Finder API
info.description: Email Finder API. Given a domain, crawls contact/about/team pages and generates common email patterns (info@, contact@, etc.), then verifies MX records for deliverability. Returns confidence-scored email addresses. Send a JSON POST request and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, authentication, and subscriptions are handled by .

post.description: Given a domain, crawls contact/about/team pages and generates common email patterns (info@, contact@, etc.), then verifies MX records for deliverability. Returns confidence-scored email addresses.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.

parameters.name: X-RapidAPI-Key
parameters.description: RapidAPI application key. RapidAPI injects this for subscribed consumers.

parameters.name: X-RapidAPI-Host
parameters.description: RapidAPI host for this API listing.
